security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Auvex governance for the whole machine.
bundle.longDescription: A small tray application that connects a PC to an Auvex governance gateway: it shows live status, toggles the system proxy to route AI traffic through the gateway egress, helps trust the egress root CA, and screens text through the gateway's moderation endpoint.
